name: aopab/review-adversarial
summary: Adversarial code review that assumes code is broken until proven otherwise. Reviews across 7 dimensions: credentials, logging, error handling, testing, idempotency, API contracts, resource management. For core domain changes, extension code, and anything touching state or external APIs. Triggers on "adversarial review", "review adversarial", "/review-adversarial", "assume broken", "stress test code", "break my code", "find bugs".
